hero.subtitle: Find dog buddies nearby, plan walks and discover the best dog-friendly spots — all in one app.

featuresPreview.label: Features
featuresPreview.title: Everything you need
featuresPreview.subtitle: BuddySpot connects dog people — on the map, in chat and in the community.
featuresPreview.liveMapDesc: See in real-time which dogs are out and about near you.
featuresPreview.pawSystemDesc: Send a Paw and connect — chat is only unlocked after a mutual match.
featuresPreview.hotspotsDesc: Discover and rate dog parks, swimming spots, walking trails and dog-friendly cafés.

cta.title: Join the Community
cta.subtitle: Your dog deserves the best friendships. Start now and find buddies nearby.

about.label: About
about.title: The Story Behind BuddySpot
about.whyText: Every dog owner knows the feeling: you're walking alone, you see other dogs in the distance, but you don't know if the other dog is friendly or if the owner even wants to socialize. BuddySpot solves exactly this problem. Before you meet someone, you already know their status, dog breed and temperament — so you can decide at ease whether a meetup is right.
about.visionText: We want to build the dog map of every city. A living map where you don't just find other dog owners, but also the best dog parks, swimming spots and cafés. A place where every walk becomes a social experience — for dog and human alike.
about.specialText: Unlike traditional social media apps, BuddySpot focuses on real-life meetups. No endless scrolling, no algorithm — just a map that shows you who's nearby right now and open to connect.
about.specialList1: Real-time map instead of a timeline
about.specialList2: Privacy: Only approximate location, precise only after match
about.specialList3: "Please Keep Distance" mode for reactive or anxious dogs
about.communityText: BuddySpot is more than an app — it's a movement. Dog people helping each other, planning walks together, organizing puppy meetups and sharing the best spots for their four-legged friends. Because every dog deserves the best friendships.

features.label: Features
features.title: All in One App
features.subtitle: BuddySpot combines live map, messaging, hotspots and community — built for dog people.
features.liveMapDesc: See in real-time which dogs are out near you. Colored markers instantly show the status: Open to Connect, Walk Buddy, Playtime or Please Keep Distance.
features.dogProfilesDesc: Create a profile for each of your dogs with photos, breed, size, gender and temperament tags like 'Playful', 'Calm' or 'Social'. So others know right away if a meetup is a good fit.
features.pawSystemDesc: Send a 'Paw' — like a friendly wave. Only when both sides confirm, chat is unlocked. No spam, no unwanted messages.
features.chatDesc: After a mutual Paw you can chat directly, share your location and arrange a walk. All within the app.
features.routesDesc: Calculate a walking route to another buddy right on the map. BuddySpot even suggests a meeting point in the middle — fair for both.
features.hotspotsDesc: Discover and rate the best dog spots in your city: dog parks, swimming spots, walking trails and dog-friendly cafés. With ratings, photos and tags from the community.
features.eventsDesc: Plan social walks, puppy meetups or agility training. Others can join, show interest and comment. Community building made easy.
features.securityDesc: Your exact location is never shown — only an approximate position. Only after a mutual match can you share your real location. The 'Please Keep Distance' mode protects reactive or anxious dogs.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about BuddySpot.
faq.a1: BuddySpot is a web app for dog owners. You see on a live map who's nearby with their dog, can send a 'Paw' to connect, chat, plan walks and discover the best dog spots in your city.
faq.a2: You create a profile for yourself and your dog, start a session with your status (e.g. 'Open to Connect' or 'Walk Buddy') and become visible on the map. Other dog owners can send you a 'Paw'. When you both confirm, chat is unlocked.
faq.a3: BuddySpot is currently in beta. You can already sign up and test the app as an early access user. The official launch date will be announced soon.
faq.a4: Yes, BuddySpot is free to use. All core features — map, Paw system, chat, hotspots and community — are available without payment.
faq.a5: Your exact location is never shown to other users. Only an approximate position appears on the map. Only when you actively share your location with a confirmed buddy can they see your precise position.
faq.a6: When your dog shouldn't have contact right now — e.g. due to training, reactivity, illness or heat — you can activate the 'Please Keep Distance' mode. Others see your red status and know to keep their distance.
faq.a7: Yes, you can delete your account completely at any time in the profile settings. All your data will be permanently removed.
faq.a8: BuddySpot was built by dog lovers for dog lovers. We believe every walk is better when shared — and every dog deserves the best friendships.
faq.a9: Dog Hotspots are community-rated dog places: dog parks, swimming spots, walking trails and dog-friendly cafés. Anyone can add new places, rate them and add tags.
faq.q10: How can I join or test?
faq.a10: Visit buddyspot.app, sign up and start right away as an early access user. We'd love your feedback! You can also reach us through the contact page.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.responsible: Responsible for content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV
impressum.contentText: The contents of our pages were created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness and timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under general law in accordance with § 7 Abs.1 TMG.
impressum.linksText: Our offer contains links to external websites of third parties, on whose contents we have no influence. Therefore we cannot assume any liability for these external contents.
impressum.copyrightText: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright require the written consent of the respective author or creator.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.collection: 2. Collection and Storage of Personal Data
datenschutz.collectionText: When you visit this website, information of a general nature is automatically collected. This information (server log files) includes the type of web browser, operating system, domain name of your Internet Service Provider, your IP address and similar.
datenschutz.contactFormText: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the form including the contact data you provided will be stored for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We will not share this data without your consent.
datenschutz.appIntro: When using the BuddySpot app, the following data is processed:
datenschutz.appLocation: Location data: Your approximate location is displayed on the map during an active session. Your exact location is only shared after your explicit consent with a confirmed buddy.
datenschutz.appProfile: Profile data: Name, email, profile picture and dog data are stored to provide the service.
datenschutz.appChat: Chat messages: Messages are stored encrypted and only made accessible to the respective chat partners.
datenschutz.cookiesText: This website only uses technically necessary cookies. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.
datenschutz.hostingText: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc.
datenschutz.rightsText: You have the right at any time to free information about your stored personal data, its origin and recipients and the purpose of data processing, as well as a right to rectification, blocking or deletion of this data.
datenschutz.rightsContact: For this and other questions about personal data, you can contact us at any time: hello@buddyspot.app
datenschutz.deletionText: You can delete your account in the BuddySpot app at any time. All personal data will be permanently removed.
